steps.t: Pippin, Merry, and Gandalf stand just within Cirith Gorgor, before the ruined Black Gates of Mordor. You should hear what Pippin has to say.
Pippin, Merry, and Gandalf stand just within Cirith Gorgor, before the ruined Black Gates of Mordor. You should hear Gandalf's response.
Pippin, Merry, and Gandalf stand just within Cirith Gorgor, before the ruined Black Gates of Mordor. You should hear Merry's rejoinder.
Pippin and Merry have returned to Cirith Gorgor, before the ruined Black Gates of Mordor. You should talk to Merry.
